#!/bin/bash

set -e

case "$1" in
    remove|deconfigure)
        echo "Arrêt du service bebznet..."

        if [ -d /opt/bebznet ] && [ -f /opt/bebznet/docker-compose.yml ]; then
            cd /opt/bebznet
            docker-compose down 2>/dev/null || true
        fi
        ;;
esac

#DEBHELPER#
